title: Master Codex Task Manifest - Solis/QSO End-to-End
description: Phased dependency DAG including completed items and remaining work for governed Solis execution, sheaf stability, and full platform rollout.

status_legend.planned: Task is queued and not yet started
status_legend.blocked: Task cannot proceed due to unmet external condition
status_legend.canceled: Task has been explicitly removed from scope

tasks.title: Create canonical Solis module boundaries and package layout
acceptance_criteria: Package boundaries are explicit and import-clean
New domains have top-level __init__.py exports

tasks.title: Define schema/model/compiler/policy versioning conventions
acceptance_criteria: Version fields are required in all governed schemas
Backward compatibility policy is documented

tasks.title: Add orchestrator CLI entrypoints: run/replay/shadow/audit/export/verify/serve
acceptance_criteria: CLI subcommands resolve without runtime import errors
CLI help documents all bounded commands

tasks.title: Define canonical QSO event envelope and signature fields
acceptance_criteria: Envelope requires event_id timestamp actor object_uri delta signature policy_version
Envelope serialization is deterministic

tasks.title: Implement append-only log, snapshot, and deterministic replay API
acceptance_criteria: Replay reconstructs state deterministically
Mutation path is append-only

tasks.title: Publish canonical QSO URI namespace map for all Solis domains
acceptance_criteria: All domain objects map to explicit URI prefixes
URI map is versioned and auditable

tasks.title: Enforce transition allowlists to deny unsafe state mutations
acceptance_criteria: Disallowed transition emits explicit deny reason
Allowed transitions are deterministic under replay

tasks.title: Implement ExecutionIntent schema and validator contract
acceptance_criteria: Intent contains bounded exposure delta horizon confidence model hashes
Schema excludes direct order authority fields

tasks.title: Complete fixed-point projector migration for deterministic stellar math
acceptance_criteria: Projection path uses Fixed64 math for core calculations
Replay hashes remain deterministic

tasks.title: Expand Alpaca adapter to full execution read/write surface
acceptance_criteria: Adapter supports account clock positions orders cancel
Responses are normalized to deterministic structures

tasks.title: Define adapter error taxonomy and failure provenance
acceptance_criteria: Network auth rate-limit and validation errors are distinct
Failure objects are replay-safe

tasks.title: Emit deterministic execution replay artifacts with hash-chain verification
acceptance_criteria: Artifacts include root_hash artifact_hash and linked event hashes
Artifact verification fails on any tamper

tasks.title: Add credential-gated Alpaca live integration tests
acceptance_criteria: Tests skip cleanly without credentials
Live probe lane validates deterministic artifact rebuild

tasks.title: Introduce venue-agnostic execution adapter interface
acceptance_criteria: Alpaca is replaceable by interface without strategy/governor changes
Interface is covered by adapter contract tests

tasks.title: Define telemetry event schema for latency slippage rejects drift anomalies
acceptance_criteria: Telemetry payloads are canonical and versioned
Telemetry events can be replayed and hashed

tasks.title: Implement telemetry sinks (QSO sink + optional OTEL/Prometheus)
acceptance_criteria: QSO sink is default and deterministic
Optional sinks are non-blocking and bounded

tasks.title: Seed telemetry dashboards for execution quality and model drift
acceptance_criteria: Dashboards expose latency slippage reject rates drift
Dashboards map metrics to strategy and venue dimensions

tasks.title: Define GovernorDecision schema (REJECTED/APPROVED_SHADOW/APPROVED_EXECUTE)
acceptance_criteria: Decision schema includes reason codes invariant traces and policy version
Decision schema is signed and replayable

tasks.title: Implement invariant library (exposure turnover liquidity volatility kill-switch)
acceptance_criteria: Invariant breaches are explicit hard failures
Invariant library is deterministic across replay

tasks.title: Enforce shadow-first rollout for new strategies
acceptance_criteria: Unapproved strategies cannot execute
Shadow history prerequisites are policy-configurable

tasks.title: Persist regulator-defensible governance audit trail
acceptance_criteria: Every decision links inputs invariants and outputs
Audit trail is signed and tamper-evident

tasks.title: Build DSL grammar parser and AST
acceptance_criteria: Grammar supports conditions horizons confidence risk hints
AST is deterministic from identical source

tasks.title: Compile DSL to ExecutionIntent only
acceptance_criteria: Compiler cannot emit raw orders
Compiler output carries source/ast/compile hashes

tasks.title: Enforce sandbox limits and no-IO deterministic DSL runtime
acceptance_criteria: DSL runtime has CPU/memory/time bounds
Forbidden capabilities fail closed

tasks.title: Add compiler lineage fields (dsl_source_hash ast_hash compiled_intent_hash)
acceptance_criteria: Lineage fields are persisted per compile
Lineage is linked in audit exports

tasks.title: Implement Whale control QSOs (weights ceilings pause state)
acceptance_criteria: Whale objects are event-sourced and replayable
Whale controls are consumed by governor/allocator

tasks.title: Implement role permissions (dev submit / whale approve / operator operate)
acceptance_criteria: Unauthorized promote/pause/weight operations are denied
Permission checks are audited

tasks.title: Expose whale control endpoints (approve pause resume set weights ceilings)
acceptance_criteria: Endpoints are idempotent and signed
Endpoint mutations update QSO objects only

tasks.title: Build regime feature extraction pipeline (vol liquidity correlation skew kurtosis spread)
acceptance_criteria: Feature vectors are deterministic from identical data windows
Feature schema is versioned

tasks.title: Implement versioned regime clustering and centroid persistence
acceptance_criteria: Cluster model version and hash are persisted
Regime assignment is replayable

tasks.title: Build overlap window detector for regime transition boundaries
acceptance_criteria: Overlap windows are deterministic and versioned
Boundary extraction handles sparse transitions

tasks.title: Fit local section models per strategy and regime
acceptance_criteria: Local section includes return drawdown cvar slippage exposure gradients
Local model hashes are persisted

tasks.title: Implement overlap compatibility metric E_ij
acceptance_criteria: Compatibility score is computed on boundary windows
Metric function is deterministic and bounded

tasks.title: Implement obstruction tensor Ω and forward Ω(t+Δ) projection
acceptance_criteria: Ω aggregates E_ij with transition probabilities
Forward projection emits signed forecast objects

tasks.title: Persist sheaf outputs to QSO stability URIs
acceptance_criteria: Writes qso://solis.sheaf/stability_matrix and overlap URIs
Writes are event-sourced and replayable

tasks.title: Bind Ω and curvature risk into governor throttles
acceptance_criteria: Ω breach tightens exposure or blocks execution
Curvature risk modifies strategy admissibility

tasks.title: Add deterministic sheaf replay tests with pinned hashes
acceptance_criteria: Compatibility matrix hash and Ω hash are pinned
Replay reproduces sheaf outputs across nodes

tasks.title: Convert sheaf math to fixed-point where required for determinism
acceptance_criteria: No uncontrolled float drift in sheaf core loops
Fixed-point conversions are explicit and tested

tasks.title: Generate risk manifold visualization artifacts from sheaf outputs
acceptance_criteria: Artifacts include fragility map and strategy robustness ranking
Visual output links back to source hashes

tasks.title: Define allocator input contract using intents governance and sheaf signals
acceptance_criteria: Allocator consumes approved intents only
Input contract excludes sensitive totals in DSL-facing paths

tasks.title: Implement constrained weighting engine with smoothing
acceptance_criteria: Weights respect hard limits and governor constraints
Weight transitions are smoothed to reduce cliffs

tasks.title: Emit allocation proof bundle for each allocation decision
acceptance_criteria: Proof bundle explains inputs constraints and outputs
Proof bundle is replay-verifiable

tasks.title: Define StrategyProposal schema with diff evidence and risk deltas
acceptance_criteria: Proposal includes expected impact and evidence hashes
Proposal is versioned signed and replayable

tasks.title: Implement shadow harness (historical replay synthetic shocks live shadow)
acceptance_criteria: Shadow pipeline produces pass/fail report per proposal
Harness is deterministic for fixed datasets

tasks.title: Require signed whale approval before promotion
acceptance_criteria: Unsigned proposals cannot promote
Promotion updates active policy reference atomically

tasks.title: Enforce no-silent-mutation guardrails on all learning updates
acceptance_criteria: All model/policy changes require proposal objects
Direct mutation paths fail closed

tasks.title: Add regime-aware bandit proposer for strategy weight updates
acceptance_criteria: Bandit emits proposal only and never mutates active weights
Bandit objective balances Sharpe and Ω

tasks.title: Pin deterministic replay hashes for long and nightly sequences
acceptance_criteria: Long and nightly state/root/anchor hashes are fixed constants
Nightly lane fails on deterministic drift

tasks.title: Add secret-gated live Alpaca CI lane
acceptance_criteria: Live lane runs only when required secrets exist
Lane skips safely without credentials

tasks.title: Build controlled hash-regeneration tooling
acceptance_criteria: Hash refresh tool emits diff report and updates constants deterministically
Tool requires explicit operator opt-in

tasks.title: Maintain expected-skip registry for optional dependencies
acceptance_criteria: Skips are classified as expected vs unexpected
CI summary reports skip classes

tasks.title: Run replay lanes across short/long/nightly matrices
acceptance_criteria: Matrix covers short long nightly replay tiers
Failures provide pinned-hash diff detail

tasks.title: Enforce local secret storage conventions and permissions
acceptance_criteria: Secrets are excluded from logs and QSO events
Secret files are owner-only permissions

tasks.title: Implement RBAC model for dev whale operator roles
acceptance_criteria: Role checks gate all privileged actions
RBAC decisions are auditable

tasks.title: Require signatures on governance and promotion decisions
acceptance_criteria: Unsigned high-trust decisions are rejected
Signature metadata is persisted for replay

tasks.title: Add tamper detection with hash-chain/Merkle anchors
acceptance_criteria: Tamper evidence is verifiable from audit artifacts
Integrity failures trigger degraded status

tasks.title: Export audit bundle for external review
acceptance_criteria: Bundle includes decision traces replay artifacts policy versions signatures
Bundle is reproducible from snapshots and logs

tasks.title: Implement redaction layer for third-party exports
acceptance_criteria: Sensitive capital totals are removed in redacted outputs
Redaction policy is explicit and testable

tasks.title: Add regulator-mode replay command
acceptance_criteria: Replay command reconstructs outcome from exported bundle
Replay output includes deterministic verification hashes

tasks.title: Build developer portal for DSL authoring and shadow results
acceptance_criteria: Developers can submit DSL and inspect shadow pass/fail
Portal enforces read-only exposure to sensitive capital

tasks.title: Build whale portal for governance controls and Ω/κ risk surfaces
acceptance_criteria: Whales can approve pause set ceilings and inspect risk surfaces
Portal actions are signed and auditable

tasks.title: Maintain local docker-compose stack for deterministic dev
acceptance_criteria: Local stack boots core services with deterministic defaults
Compose includes isolated mock dependencies

tasks.title: Maintain Kubernetes manifests for multi-node QSO deployment
acceptance_criteria: K8s manifests apply with dry-run validation
Manifests include replay and audit service components

tasks.title: Integrate observability stack for metrics traces structured logs
acceptance_criteria: Execution and governance traces are queryable
Alerts exist for invariant breaches and drift spikes

tasks.title: Run backup/restore disaster recovery drills
acceptance_criteria: Restore reproduces deterministic state from snapshots+logs
DR drill report includes RTO/RPO and validation hashes
